untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'confirm uptrend for 5+ consecutive days' and 'price > 50-day MA by at least 3%' — neither can be expressed with allowed operators. The 5-day confirmation requires historical bar-by-bar validation logic not supported by single-bar conditions. The 3% threshold comparison requires indicator arithmetic (close / sma_50 > 1.03) which is not permitted.
translation_notes: Translated core momentum entry: price above $10 minimum, price above 50-day MA (approximates strength condition), and volume above 30-day average. Exit on MA cross below. Used vol_ratio_20 as proxy for volume above 30-day average. Direction set to LONG based on 'buy' signal. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP per category TREND and signal intent. Stop loss set to 12% per exit conditions.
